subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath made the seasons manifestations of His names amongst His servants, through which He taketh and giveth, that all may be assured [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی جعل الفصول مظاهر اسمائه بین عباده و بها یاخذ و یعطی لتوقن کل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @business; financial; property matters, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @goodly deeds; actions, @purpose; goal of creation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
